plugins.name: core-skills
plugins.description: The ShiftCut core set — install this one: the /shiftcut router, the shiftcut-* domain skills, and media-use. The router installs each creation workflow on demand. The full bundle (all skills at once) is `shiftcut`.

plugins.name: shiftcut
plugins.description: All ShiftCut skills in one static bundle. Most setups want `core-skills` instead — the router installs creation workflows on demand. ShiftCut by Verblike — CapCut on autopilot. Open any video and tell your coding agent what you want; ShiftCut edits it for you. Cut, caption, reframe, and turn footage into shorts — all local, all open source.
